title: My AI Memory Now Follows Me Across Every Tool!
summary: Walrus Memory is a memory layer that persists outside individual AI agents, allowing context and memories to transfer between different tools and providers. The system encrypts memories before storage and grants users ownership and control over which agents can access them.
